headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk/opportunity (liquidity-driven valuation range, not direct P&L impact) at stake — YES Bank's inclusion in Nifty Bank set to boost liquidity and ETF flows, enhancing market visibility
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, DJSI frameworks referenced; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
Possible modest P/E expansion if sustained ETF inflows occur; no direct margin or revenue impact.
Marginally lower cost of capital due to higher liquidity; potential for slight bond spread compression as investor base widens.
